title: Computer Organization
author: Carl Hamacher, Zvonko Vranesic, Safwat Zaky
description: A foundational book that explains the basics of computer hardware, architecture, and system design.

title: Operating System Concepts
author: Abraham Silberschatz, Peter B. Galvin, Greg Gagne
description: it's a comprehensive guide on operating systems, covering topics like processes, memory, and file systems.

title: Digital Logic and Computer Design
author: M. Morris Mano
description: A classic introduction to digital logic circuits, including combinational and sequential circuits, and computer organization.

title: Computer Networks
author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum, David J. Wetherall
description: A complete guide on networking principles and protocols, with real-world examples and problem-solving techniques.

title: Data Communications and Networking
author: Behrouz A. Forouzan
description: A widely used book that introduces networking and data communication concepts, suitable for both beginners and professionals.

title: Software Engineering: A Practitioner's Approach
author: Roger S. Pressman
description: A top resource for software engineering, covering SDLC models, agile methods, and software project management.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thoms H Cormen, Cliford Stein
description: A definitive guide to algorithms, covering topics from basic sorting to complex graph algorithms and dynamic programming.

title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach
author: Stuart Russell, Peter Norvig
description: A leading textbook on AI, covering topics such as search algorithms, machine learning, robotics, and natural language processing.

title: Database System Concepts
author: Abraham Silberschatz, Henry F. Korth, S. Sudarshan
description: An essential resource for understanding database design, SQL, normalization, and transaction management.

title: Computer Graphics with OpenGL
author: Donald D. Hearn, M. Pauline Baker
description: A practical book on computer graphics using OpenGL, covering topics such as 2D/3D modeling, transformations, and rendering.
